variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16172 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16172 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16172 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF258 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16172
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF258 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16172
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF258 axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
